title: Spec compliance review: 2026-07-11 code commits vs spec/*.md
description: Review the 2026-07-11 code commit batch (1dbe31a7ed~1..936600c332) against spec/*.md for protocol violations. Scope: LCI CoAP handlers, SLIP/KISS/BLE transports, link layer + schnorr48, SCHC (Rust+C), OSCORE, RPL/routing headers, Meshtastic/MeshCore bridges. Findings filed as child issues.
